subcodes.first_line: O lover of Bahá! When the light of truth shone forth from the glass of oneness, lover and Beloved were locked in close embrace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محب بهاء نور حقیقت چون در زجاجه احدیت اشراق نمود عاشق و معشوق دست در آغوش
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @evanescence and eternality; fana and baqa, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @service to others; to the Cause of God, @eternal archetypes [a'yan-i-thabitah], @servitude; submission to God; repentance
